metadata.name: pact_network_v1
metadata.description: Pact Network v1 — parametric micro-insurance for AI-agent API payments. Pinocchio-based program. The IDL is hand-written: per-event accounts and per-event payload bytes inside settle_batch are documented here as opaque `bytes`/remainingAccounts because the layout is variable (count-driven), not a fixed Anchor variant.

instructions.name: initialize_settlement_authority
docs: Create the singleton SettlementAuthority PDA. The PDA itself is the SPL-Token delegate every agent pre-approves off-chain via SPL Approve; the program signs as this PDA via invoke_signed during settle_batch.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.authority. Pays rent.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Singleton PDA [b"protocol_config"]; must already be initialized.

accounts.name: settlement_authority
docs: PDA [b"settlement_authority"]; created here.

args.name: signer_pubkey
docs: The off-chain settler signer that is allowed to call settle_batch.

instructions.name: register_endpoint
docs: Atomically register an endpoint AND create its per-slug CoveragePool PDA + USDC vault. Folds the legacy initialize_coverage_pool path so an endpoint can never exist without a pool.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.authority.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Singleton PDA [b"protocol_config"]; must be initialized.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Singleton PDA [b"treasury"]; readonly. Used to substitute Treasury-kind fee recipient destinations with the Treasury USDC vault.

accounts.name: endpoint_config
docs: PDA [b"endpoint", slug]; created here.

accounts.name: coverage_pool
docs: PDA [b"coverage_pool", slug]; created here.

accounts.name: pool_vault
docs: Pre-allocated 165-byte SPL token account; initialized here with owner = coverage_pool PDA.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.usdc_mint.

args.name: slug
docs: Endpoint slug; ASCII-printable bytes, zero-padded.

args.name: fee_recipients_present
docs: 0 = use ProtocolConfig defaults. 1 = use the supplied fee_recipients.

args.name: fee_recipient_count
docs: 0..=8. Only meaningful when fee_recipients_present == 1.

args.name: fee_recipients
docs: When fee_recipients_present == 1: count * 48 bytes, each entry is FeeRecipient on-wire (kind u8, 7 pad, destination [u8;32], bps u16 LE, 6 pad). Empty otherwise.

instructions.name: update_endpoint_config
docs: Pool-authority-only updates to mutable EndpointConfig fields. Each field is preceded by a 1-byte presence flag; absent fields keep their previous value.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.authority.

instructions.name: pause_endpoint
docs: Toggle the paused flag on an endpoint. 0 = unpause, 1 = pause.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.authority.

instructions.name: top_up_coverage_pool
docs: Top up a per-endpoint coverage pool from the pool authority's USDC ATA. SPL Token transfer from authority_ata to pool_vault, signed by authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal CoveragePool.authority.

accounts.name: coverage_pool
docs: PDA [b"coverage_pool", slug].

accounts.name: authority_ata
docs: Source USDC ATA; owner = authority.

accounts.name: pool_vault
docs: Destination USDC token account; must equal CoveragePool.usdc_vault.

instructions.name: settle_batch
docs: Process up to MAX_BATCH_SIZE settlement events. Per event: (1) validate endpoint and exposure cap; (2) init CallRecord PDA (rejects duplicate call_id); (3) premium-in via SPL transfer agent_ata -> pool_vault using SettlementAuthority delegate; (4) fee fan-out from pool_vault to each fee_recipient ATA, authority = CoveragePool PDA; (5) on breach, refund pool_vault -> agent_ata.

ACCOUNT LAYOUT — Anchor IDL cannot model the variable per-event tail accounts, so the IDL declares only the fixed prefix (settler_signer, settlement_authority, token_program, system_program). All per-event accounts (call_record, coverage_pool, pool_vault, endpoint_config, agent_ata, then `endpoint.fee_recipient_count` fee-recipient ATAs) must be appended in order as remaining accounts; consult the Rust handler doc-comment in src/instructions/settle_batch.rs.

EVENT PAYLOAD — packed as: u16 LE event_count, then `event_count * 104` bytes per event. Per-event layout: call_id [u8;16], agent owner pubkey [u8;32], endpoint_slug [u8;16], premium_lamports u64, refund_lamports u64, latency_ms u32, breach u8, fee_recipient_count_hint u8, _pad [u8;6], timestamp i64, _pad2 [u8;4].

accounts.name: settler_signer
docs: Must equal SettlementAuthority.signer.

accounts.name: settlement_authority
docs: PDA [b"settlement_authority"]; SPL-Token delegate.

args.name: events_blob
docs: Variable-length packed event blob; see instruction docs for layout. Use raw bytes because per-event size and per-event account count depend on each endpoint's fee_recipient_count.

instructions.name: initialize_protocol_config
docs: Initialize the singleton ProtocolConfig PDA with default fee recipients and an optional max_total_fee_bps override.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Pays rent and becomes the protocol authority.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: PDA [b"protocol_config"]; created here.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: Must equal USDC_DEVNET or USDC_MAINNET.

args.name: max_total_fee_bps_present
docs: 0 = use DEFAULT_MAX_TOTAL_FEE_BPS (3000). 1 = use the supplied value.

args.name: default_fee_recipients
docs: count * 48 bytes; each entry is FeeRecipient on-wire.

instructions.name: initialize_treasury
docs: Initialize the singleton Treasury PDA + USDC vault. Vault is initialized via SPL InitializeAccount3 with owner = treasury PDA.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.authority. Pays rent.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: PDA [b"treasury"]; created here.

accounts.name: treasury_vault
docs: Pre-allocated 165-byte SPL token account; initialized here.

instructions.name: update_fee_recipients
docs: Atomically replace an endpoint's fee_recipients array. Treasury-kind entries get their destination substituted with the Treasury USDC vault.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must equal ProtocolConfig.authority.

args.name: fee_recipients
docs: count * 48 bytes; each entry is FeeRecipient on-wire.

types.name: FeeRecipient
docs: 48-byte fee recipient entry. Wire layout: kind u8, _pad0 [u8;7], destination [u8;32], bps u16 LE, _pad1 [u8;6]. Embedded inline in EndpointConfig.fee_recipients[8] and ProtocolConfig.default_fee_recipients[8].

fields.name: kind
docs: FeeRecipientKind discriminant: 0 = Treasury, 1 = AffiliateAta, 2 = AffiliatePda.

types.name: CoveragePool
docs: Per-endpoint PDA [b"coverage_pool", endpoint_slug]; 160 bytes.

types.name: EndpointConfig
docs: Per-endpoint PDA [b"endpoint", slug]; 544 bytes.

types.name: CallRecord
docs: Dedup sentinel PDA [b"call", call_id]; 104 bytes.

types.name: SettlementAuthority
docs: Singleton PDA [b"settlement_authority"]; 48 bytes. Acts as the SPL-Token delegate for every agent ATA.

types.name: Treasury
docs: Singleton PDA [b"treasury"]; 80 bytes. Owns the protocol-side USDC vault.

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Singleton PDA [b"protocol_config"]; 464 bytes.
